name: Le Bureau des Rêves
publisher: A Maze In - Live Escape Game
short_description: This puzzle game, designed by independents escape room creators, will put your brain to the test! Observation, deduction, logic and twists... all the ingredients of a good escape room are here, right from your cozy little nest :)
detailed_description:
This puzzle game immerses you in a world where, every night, dreams and nightmares clash in an ancient struggle. As a field agent for the Bureau of Dreams, you must investigate a mysterious abandoned factory and uncover whether it is a secret hideout of the Nightmare Committee.

If so, you will need to figure out how they manufacture nightmares and reverse their production to bring restful, peaceful nights to the entire world. All in the utmost secrecy, of course!

Observation, deduction, and hands-on investigation will be the keys to your adventure.
